ddls:
CREATE TABLE "records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "record_type" TEXT /* Type of the record (e.g., Single Cut, Full Album) */,
  "song_title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "record_number" TEXT /* Record number (e.g., ASCD-101, ASMP3-101) */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist associated with the record */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the record */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre associated with the record */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was released */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album associated with the record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the record (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_records_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_records_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_records_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Full name of the artist */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre associated with the artist */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for customer login */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record(s) ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was made */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., shipped, processing) */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., standard, express) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment provider */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "payment_provider" TEXT /* Payment provider used (e.g., Stripe, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the album was released */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist associated with the album */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre associated with the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record associated with the analytics */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist associated with the analytics */,
  "sales_count" INTEGER /* Number of sales for the record */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the analytics were recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the analytics data (e.g., website, mobile app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES records ("record_id")
)
